title: JWT Learning Path
seoTitle: JWT Learning Path — From Beginner to Expert
description: Structured JWT learning path. Master token decoding, validation, OAuth integration, and security best practices step by step.

steps.title: Understand JWT Structure
steps.description: Learn header, payload, signature. Decode your first token.

steps.title: Authentication Flow
steps.description: How JWT authentication works in APIs and web apps.

steps.title: Validate & Debug Tokens
steps.description: Verify signatures, check claims, debug issues.

steps.title: Choose the Right Algorithm
steps.description: HS256 vs RS256 and when to use JWKS.

steps.title: OAuth & Production Security
steps.description: OAuth integration, refresh tokens, and security hardening.

commonMistakes: Ignoring exp, iss, and aud validation

attackScenarios.name: Algorithm Confusion
attackScenarios.mitigation: Whitelist algorithms, never use public key as HMAC secret

attackScenarios.name: Token Replay
attackScenarios.mitigation: Short exp, jti claim with revocation list
